name: FingerTango Inc.
summary: FingerTango Inc., an investment holding company, develops, operates, and publishes mobile games in the People's Republic of China. The company publishes and sells simulation mobile games. As of December 31, 2019, it had approximately 167.7 million cumulative registered users. FingerTango Inc. was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Tianhe, China.
